items.question: How do I order a knife?
items.answer: Browse the store for pieces available now, or use the custom builder to design your own, then send an enquiry. There's no online checkout — Nicky confirms the details, price and delivery with you directly before anything is paid.

items.question: How much does a knife cost?
items.answer: It depends on the size, materials and detail of each piece, so prices are on enquiry. Send a message or a custom spec and Nicky will reply with a price.

items.question: How long does a custom knife take?
items.answer: Roughly 4–6 weeks, depending on the build and how busy the workshop is. Nicky will give you a timeline when he confirms your order.

items.question: How do I pay?
items.answer: Card (Visa / Mastercard via Yoco) or EFT. Payment is arranged with Nicky directly once your order is confirmed — nothing is charged through the website.

items.question: Do you deliver, and where?
items.answer: Delivery is arranged with you when you order. Knives can usually be couriered anywhere in South Africa. For orders outside South Africa, please ask first — some couriers and countries restrict shipping blades.

items.question: Is there a guarantee?
items.answer: Yes — every knife is hand-made and guaranteed against workmanship faults. If something isn't right, talk to Nicky.

items.question: Can I have a knife personalised or engraved?
items.answer: Often, yes. Mention what you'd like in your custom request and Nicky will let you know what's possible.

items.question: How do I look after my knife?
items.answer: Keep it clean and dry after use. Carbon-steel blades naturally develop a patina and like a light wipe of oil now and then; stainless is lower-maintenance. Avoid the dishwasher.

items.question: Can I see the knives in person?
items.answer: Sometimes — Nicky exhibits at markets and shows around Johannesburg. Keep an eye on the banner at the top of the home page for the next event.
